commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh For her blood is in the midst of her; she set it upon the top of a rock; she poured it not upon the ground, to cover it with dust; She hath. Septuagint, "I have let it corrupt upon. I have not", (ver. ; Haydock) as if God spoke. The Jews had committed murder without fear. They had naturally a horror for blood, and the law ordered even that of beasts to be covered, Leviticus xvii. Now innocent blood cries for vengeance, Genesis iv. The punishment shall be as visible as the crime, ver.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
